cases.title: Organizer Admin sets registration open/close timing during event creation in Draft
preconditions: Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor with organization scope
Valid create payload with ruleConfig.registrationOpenAt and ruleConfig.registrationCloseAt as ISO-8601 timestamps where openAt < closeAt
Other ruleConfig fields (capacity, check-in, feedback windows) are chronologically consistent
steps: Invoke eventService.create with name, basic fields, and ruleConfig including registrationOpenAt and registrationCloseAt within a real DB transaction
Read persisted event_rule_configs row linked to the new event
cases.expected: Event is created in Draft state; event_rule_configs.registration_open_at and registration_close_at equal the configured values; satisfies Workflow A step 2 (admin configures EventRuleConfig including registration window) and Event Module rule config ownership

cases.title: POST /events persists registration window and GET detail returns it
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT scoped to the organization
POST body includes ruleConfig with registrationOpenAt and registrationCloseAt within valid chronological order
steps: POST /api/v1/events with Authorization bearer and ruleConfig registration window fields in JSON body
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} with the same organizer token
cases.expected: POST returns HTTP 200 with ruleConfig.registrationOpenAt and ruleConfig.registrationCloseAt in the entity snapshot; GET detail returns HTTP 200 with the same registration window values on the linked EventRuleConfig per API design §2.1 Event Management

cases.title: Organizer Admin updates registration window on Draft event without audit reason
preconditions: Existing event in Draft state with initial registration window configured
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor with event scope
Registration has not yet been opened (event state Published or Draft)
steps: Record event_rule_configs.registration_open_at and registration_close_at before update (beforeState)
Invoke eventService.update(eventId, { ruleConfig: { registrationOpenAt: newOpen, registrationCloseAt: newClose } }, organizerAdminContext)
Read event_rule_configs.registration_open_at and registration_close_at after update (afterState)
cases.expected: Update succeeds without mandatory reason payload; afterState reflects newOpen and newClose; no AUDIT_REQUIRED_FOR_CRITICAL_CHANGE error because registration is not yet open

cases.title: Organizer Admin configures registration window in event setup Section 3
preconditions: Web app running with organizer authenticated as OrganizerAdmin
Organizer navigates to event create or edit flow
steps: Complete Section 1 basic event details and Section 2 capacity settings
In Section 3 (registration window), enter registration open and close date/time values
Save draft and open event detail or edit view
cases.expected: UI persists and displays the entered registration open and close times on event detail or edit form; Section 3 registration window fields are editable by Organizer Admin per forms layout §Section 3

cases.title: Flow A lifecycle uses configured registration window after open-registration
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT
E2E fixture: Draft event created with registrationOpenAt and registrationCloseAt suitable for Flow A
Fixed clock within configured registration window
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/publish then POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/open-registration
POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations as participant while inside configured window
cases.expected: Event transitions Published → RegistrationOpen; participant registration succeeds only when current time falls within admin-configured registrationOpenAt/registrationCloseAt; Flow A draft → publish → open registration → register proceeds using FR-03 configuration

cases.title: Post-registration-open registration window change with reason updates EventRuleConfig and audit
preconditions: Event published and RegistrationOpen with initial registrationOpenAt and registrationCloseAt
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor
Mandatory reasonCode and reasonText available for critical change
steps: Invoke eventService.update(eventId, { ruleConfig: { registrationCloseAt: extendedClose }, reasonCode: "REG_WINDOW_EXTENDED", reasonText: "Extended deadline due to demand" }, context)
Read event_rule_configs.registration_close_at and version for the event
Query audit logs for entityType EventRuleConfig
cases.expected: Update succeeds; registration_close_at persisted as extendedClose; event_rule_configs.version incremented; audit record written with before/after registration window values, actor, and reason per BR-22 and INV-06; satisfies Flow C critical config change verification

cases.title: Testing-plan §3 register-with-seat scenario requires registration window open
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen with registrationOpenAt and registrationCloseAt configured
Fixed clock set to a time strictly between openAt and closeAt
Authenticated participant with no prior registration
Event has available capacity
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations with participant JWT while current time is inside the configured window
Verify response state is Registered
cases.expected: Registration succeeds with state Registered; cross-walks testing-plan §3 row 'Register with available seat' (AC-01, BR-03) which depends on BR-02 registration window gate; admin-configured registrationOpenAt/registrationCloseAt are authoritative

cases.title: PATCH /events/{eventId} updates registration window on Draft event
preconditions: Draft event with EventRuleConfig registrationOpenAt and registrationCloseAt configured
OrganizerAdmin JWT authorized for eventId
steps: PATCH /api/v1/events/{eventId} with JSON body { "ruleConfig": { "registrationOpenAt": "2026-08-01T08:00:00Z", "registrationCloseAt": "2026-08-15T23:59:59Z" } }
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} with OrganizerAdmin Authorization bearer
cases.expected: PATCH returns HTTP 200 with updated ruleConfig.registrationOpenAt and ruleConfig.registrationCloseAt in response snapshot; GET returns HTTP 200 confirming persisted registration window per API design §2.1

cases.title: OrganizerStaff and Participant cannot configure registration timing
preconditions: Existing Draft event owned by the organization
Authenticated JWTs for OrganizerStaff and Participant separately
PATCH body with ruleConfig registrationOpenAt and registrationCloseAt change
steps: PATCH /api/v1/events/{eventId} with OrganizerStaff bearer token and registration window change
PATCH /api/v1/events/{eventId} with Participant bearer token and registration window change
cases.expected: Both requests return HTTP 403 unauthorized; registration_open_at and registration_close_at remain unchanged; permission matrix Configure rules/capacity/windows is OrganizerAdmin only per roles-permissions §2 (BR-21)

cases.title: Unauthenticated registration timing configuration is rejected
preconditions: Valid POST or PATCH body with ruleConfig registration window fields
No Authorization header on request
steps: POST /api/v1/events without bearer token including ruleConfig registrationOpenAt and registrationCloseAt
PATCH /api/v1/events/{eventId} without bearer token changing registration window
cases.expected: Both requests return HTTP 401 unauthenticated; registration window configuration handler is not invoked for unauthenticated actors

cases.title: Post-open registration window change without reason is rejected
preconditions: Event in RegistrationOpen state with configured registration window
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor
Update payload extends registrationCloseAt but omits reasonCode and reasonText
steps: Attempt eventService.update(eventId, { ruleConfig: { registrationCloseAt: newClose } }, context) without reason fields
Verify event_rule_configs.registration_close_at unchanged
cases.expected: ApiError with code AUDIT_REQUIRED_FOR_CRITICAL_CHANGE; registration_close_at remains at prior value; satisfies INV-06 post-registration-open critical config change guard

cases.title: Registration rejected before configured registrationOpenAt
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen (or Published with registration not yet effective) with registrationOpenAt in the future relative to fixed clock
Authenticated participant with no active registration
Fixed clock set to current time strictly before registrationOpenAt
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations with participant JWT
cases.expected: HTTP 422 semantic rule violation with code REGISTRATION_WINDOW_CLOSED; no registration row created in Registered or Waitlisted state; API guardrail reject registration when outside registration window upheld per validation rules BR-02

cases.title: Registration rejected after configured registrationCloseAt
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen with registrationCloseAt in the past relative to fixed clock
Authenticated participant with no active registration
Fixed clock set to current time strictly after registrationCloseAt
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations with participant JWT
cases.expected: HTTP 422 with code REGISTRATION_WINDOW_CLOSED and user-safe message indicating registration is closed; no new active registration persisted; aligns with forms UX microcopy policy for closed registration

cases.title: Create or PATCH rejects registrationOpenAt on or after registrationCloseAt
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT
Payload with ruleConfig where registrationOpenAt >= registrationCloseAt; all other fields otherwise valid
steps: POST /api/v1/events with invalid registration window (openAt >= closeAt)
PATCH /api/v1/events/{eventId} with invalid registration window on Draft event
cases.expected: HTTP 400 or 422 with code INVALID_INPUT indicating openAt must be before closeAt; no event_rule_configs row created or updated with invalid window; violates TimeWindow invariant openAt < closeAt per database design

cases.title: Create or PATCH rejects malformed ISO-8601 registration window timestamps
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT
Payload with registrationOpenAt or registrationCloseAt as non-ISO-8601 string (e.g. "July 1" or empty)
steps: POST /api/v1/events with invalid registrationOpenAt or registrationCloseAt
PATCH /api/v1/events/{eventId} with invalid registration window timestamp
cases.expected: HTTP 400 with code INVALID_INPUT and field-level details; no event_rule_configs row created or updated with malformed timestamps; API strict input validation before domain execution per §5

cases.title: Cross-field validation rejects registration window conflicting with event start/end
preconditions: Draft event with startAt and endAt defined
Update payload where registrationCloseAt is after event endAt or registrationOpenAt is incoherent with event schedule
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: Attempt eventService.create or update with chronologically inconsistent registration window relative to event startAt/endAt or other rule windows
Query event_rule_configs for the event
cases.expected: Validation fails with semantic error before commit; no partial rule config persisted; satisfies Workflow A guardrail block publish on invalid time windows and forms cross-field validation for window logic

cases.title: Configured registration window is enforced by registration module validation pipeline
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen with admin-configured registrationOpenAt and registrationCloseAt
Registration module receives request when fixed clock is outside the window
steps: Invoke registrationService.register with participant outside the configured window within a real DB transaction
Verify no state transition to Registered or Waitlisted occurs and no registration row is committed
cases.expected: Registration pipeline step 2 (event state and registration window) fails before dedup and capacity checks; REGISTRATION_WINDOW_CLOSED returned; admin-configured timing is the authoritative gate for BR-02

cases.title: Critical registration window change increments event_rule_configs.version
preconditions: RegistrationOpen event with known registration window and initial version
OrganizerAdmin actor with valid reason payload
steps: Record event_rule_configs.version before update (beforeState)
Update registrationCloseAt with reasonCode and reasonText
Read version after commit (afterState)
cases.expected: afterState version equals beforeState version + 1 on successful critical registration window change; supports configuration version history per database design and BR-22

cases.title: Registration window boundary: openAt inclusive and closeAt exclusive per domain policy
preconditions: EventRuleConfig with registrationOpenAt T1 and registrationCloseAt T2
Fixed clock abstraction available for deterministic time-window tests per testing plan §7
steps: Evaluate canRegister (or equivalent) at exactly T1 (registration open boundary)
Evaluate canRegister at exactly T2 (registration close boundary)
Compare outcomes against documented TimeWindow semantics
cases.expected: At T1 registration is permitted when event state is RegistrationOpen and other guards pass; at T2 registration is rejected with REGISTRATION_WINDOW_CLOSED unless domain explicitly defines inclusive close; boundary behavior is deterministic and documented

cases.title: Participant sees registration closed messaging when outside configured window
preconditions: Web app running with participant authenticated
Event detail page for RegistrationOpen event where fixed clock is after registrationCloseAt
Event has available capacity
steps: Navigate to event detail page for the event
Observe registration action button or badge state
Attempt register action if exposed
cases.expected: UI shows registration closed state (badge or disabled register control) with concrete message such as 'Registration is closed for this event'; no successful registration occurs outside admin-configured window per forms UX microcopy policy
